zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Arnould de Gavre VI於1366年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫利時，他的父親Arnould de Gavre IV48歲，母親Jeanne De Rasseghem40歲。他於1380年5月17日與Margaretha Van Boutershem結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1418年5月1日在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在比利時布拉班特布波瑟爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baron Arnould de Gavre VI于1366年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫利时，他的父亲Arnould de Gavre IV48岁，母亲Jeanne De Rasseghem40岁。他于1380年5月17日与Margaretha Van Boutershem结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1418年5月1日在他的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在比利时布拉班特布波瑟爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gavre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German Köber (see Kober ) or Göber (see Gober ).

variants.name: Kober
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Bernhard, Angelika, Dieter, Ernst, Erwin, Gottlieb, Konrad, Manfred, Reinhold, Sepp, Wolfgang.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a shortened derivative of the personal name Jakob (see Jacob ).

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German kober, German Kober ‘basket’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a basket maker or perhaps a nickname for someone who carried a basket on his back.

nameMeanings.name: Arnould
meanings: Saxon, Latin: Faithful to his honour; help in war, helping lord; powerful lord.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Arnould de Gavre VI was born in 1366, in Schorisse, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Arnould de Gavre IV, was 48 and his mother, Jeanne De Rasseghem, was 40. He married Margaretha Van Boutershem on 17 May 1380. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 1 May 1418, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Brussels, Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Arnould de Gavre VI est né en 1366, à Schorisse, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Arnould de Gavre IV, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Jeanne De Rasseghem, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Margaretha Van Boutershem le 17 mai 1380. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1418, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Bruxelles, Brabant, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Arnould de Gavre VI 1366 in Schorisse, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnould de Gavre IV 48 und seine Mutter Jeanne De Rasseghem 40. Er hat am 17. Mai 1380 Margaretha Van Boutershem geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Mai 1418 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Brüssel, Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Arnould de Gavre VI è nato il nel 1366 nel Schorisse, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Arnould de Gavre IV, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne De Rasseghem, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Margaretha Van Boutershem il 17 maggio 1380. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 maggio 1418, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Brussel, Brabante, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron Arnould de Gavre VIが1366年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンスチオリッセで生まれた時，父Arnould de Gavre IVは48歳，母Jeanne De Rasseghemは40歳であった。1380年5月17日にMargaretha Van Boutershemと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1418年5月1日に故郷で52歳で死去し，ベルギーブラバントブルセルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Arnould de Gavre VI(이)가 1366년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 슈리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnould de Gavre IV(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne De Rasseghem(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1380년 5월 17일 Margaretha Van Boutershem(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1418년 5월 1일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 브라반트 브루셀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Arnould de Gavre VI nasceu em 1366, em Schorisse, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Arnould de Gavre IV, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne De Rasseghem, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaretha Van Boutershem em 17 de maio de 1380. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de maio de 1418, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Bruxelas, Brabante, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Arnould de Gavre VI родился в 1366 г. в местности щаурисс, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Arnould de Gavre IV было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne De Rasseghem, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaretha Van Boutershem 17 мая 1380 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 1 мая 1418 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности брассел, брабант, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baron Arnould de Gavre VI nació en 1366, en Schorisse, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Arnould de Gavre IV, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Jeanne De Rasseghem, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Margaretha Van Boutershem el 17 de mayo de 1380. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1418, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Brussel, Brabante, Bélgica.
